'''âng-sh-p''' ('''kangashap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whirr|whirr]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-sh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whirr|whirr]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-sh-p
|-
! Lemma
| kangashap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingashap|thingashap]] || [[word:jingashap|jingashap]] || [[word:shingashap|shingashap]] || [[word:kingashap|kingashap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungashap|thuthungashap]] || [[word:jujungashap|jujungashap]] || [[word:shushungashap|shushungashap]] || [[word:kukungashap|kukungashap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungashap|thungashap]] || [[word:jungashap|jungashap]] || [[word:shungashap|shungashap]] || [[word:kungashap|kungashap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungashap|thungashap]] || [[word:jungashap|jungashap]] || [[word:shungashap|shungashap]] || [[word:kungashap|kungashap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengashap|thengashap]] || [[word:jengashap|jengashap]] || [[word:shengashap|shengashap]] || [[word:kengashap|kengashap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongashap|thothongashap]] || [[word:jojongashap|jojongashap]] || [[word:shoshongashap|shoshongashap]] || [[word:kokongashap|kokongashap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongashap|thongashap]] || [[word:jongashap|jongashap]] || [[word:shongashap|shongashap]] || [[word:kongashap|kongashap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongashap|thongashap]] || [[word:jongashap|jongashap]] || [[word:shongashap|shongashap]] || [[word:kongashap|kongashap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠngashap|thĂŠngashap]] || [[word:jĂŠngashap|jĂŠngashap]] || [[word:shĂŠngashap|shĂŠngashap]] || [[word:kĂŠngashap|kĂŠngashap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangashap|thathangashap]] || [[word:jajangashap|jajangashap]] || [[word:shashangashap|shashangashap]] || [[word:kakangashap|kakangashap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangashap|thangashap]] || [[word:jangashap|jangashap]] || [[word:shangashap|shangashap]] || [[word:kangashap|kangashap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangashap|thangashap]] || [[word:jangashap|jangashap]] || [[word:shangashap|shangashap]] || [[word:kangashap|kangashap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangashap|shangashap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangashap|goshangashap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangashap|gokishangashap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangashapnĂŒ|shangashapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangashapnknĂŒ|goshangashapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangashapnĂŒ|gokishangashapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangashapshĂ«|shangashapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangashapnkshĂ«|goshangashapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangashapshĂ«|gokishangashapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangashapro|shangashapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangashapnkro|goshangashapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangashapro|gokishangashapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangashapmu|shangashapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangashapnkmu|goshangashapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangashapmu|gokishangashapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangashapsher|shangashapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangashapnksher|goshangashapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangashapsher|gokishangashapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangashapng|shangashapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangashapnkng|goshangashapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangashapng|gokishangashapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangashapya|shangashapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangashapnkya|goshangashapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangashapya|gokishangashapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangashapyam|shangashapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangashapnkyam|goshangashapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangashapyam|gokishangashapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangashapnĂŒshĂ«|shangashapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangashapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshangashapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangashapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishangashapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangashapnĂŒro|shangashapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangashapnknĂŒro|goshangashapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangashapnĂŒro|gokishangashapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangashapnĂŒmu|shangashapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangashapnknĂŒmu|goshangashapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangashapnĂŒmu|gokishangashapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangashapshĂ«nĂŒ|shangashapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangashapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshangashapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangashapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishangashapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangashapshĂ«ro|shangashapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangashapnkshĂ«ro|goshangashapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangashapshĂ«ro|gokishangashapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangashapshĂ«mu|shangashapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangashapnkshĂ«mu|goshangashapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangashapshĂ«mu|gokishangashapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangashapronĂŒ|shangashapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangashapnkronĂŒ|goshangashapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangashapronĂŒ|gokishangashapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangashaproshĂ«|shangashaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangashapnkroshĂ«|goshangashapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangashaproshĂ«|gokishangashaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangashapromu|shangashapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangashapnkromu|goshangashapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangashapromu|gokishangashapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangashapmunĂŒ|shangashapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangashapnkmunĂŒ|goshangashapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangashapmunĂŒ|gokishangashapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangashapmushĂ«|shangashapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangashapnkmushĂ«|goshangashapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangashapmushĂ«|gokishangashapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangashapmuro|shangashapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangashapnkmuro|goshangashapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangashapmuro|gokishangashapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
